description:
🕒 10:00–12:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-naguricanoe-canoesyokyu/

Canadian canoe is an active, dynamic paddling experience using a single-blade paddle to glide smoothly across the water. Learn to steer and master control techniques while enjoying yourself on the lake.

【Fee】3,000 yen per person (includes guide, insurance, and canoe rental)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Staff from the certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop

【What to bring】Drinks (vending machine available at the workshop), sun protection (hat, sunglasses, etc.)

【More information】Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop website: https://naguri-canoe.co.jp/
location: 集合 名栗カヌー工房（国際興業バス「ノーラ名栗・さわらびの湯」下車徒歩20分、または「河又名栗湖入口」下車25分）
summary: Canadian Canoe Beginner Lesson at Naguri Lake – Enjoy a relaxing time on the water
